$comment: Curated business models for the Startup Engine. Each maps a business concept to a real PulseNetwork vertical + endpoints. CI-validated against lib/verticals.ts (tools/validate-models.mjs): unknown vertical = hard fail, unknown endpoint = warning. 'suggested_retail' is what the RESELLER charges their customer; wholesale via a scoped key is near-$0. Economics are ILLUSTRATIVE, never guarantees.

models.title: AI Exam-Prep Tutor
models.tagline: Sell exam study guides, quizzes and flashcards per question.

models.title: Sports & Prediction-Market Intelligence
models.tagline: Sell calibrated game reads, DFS lineups and prediction-market edges.

models.title: Pre-Trade Token-Safety Bot
models.tagline: Sell instant rug/honeypot checks to crypto trading agents & Telegram groups.

models.title: AI Immigration & Relocation Advisor
models.tagline: Sell visa-eligibility checks and relocation pathways worldwide.

models.title: AI Insurance Advisor
models.tagline: Sell coverage analysis and policy audits (advice + affiliate handoff).

models.title: AI Deal & Coupon Finder
models.tagline: Sell stacked-discount and price-drop intel to shoppers and creators.

models.title: AI Meal-Plan & Grocery Service
models.tagline: Sell dietary meal plans, recipes and budget grocery lists on subscription.

models.title: AI Travel Concierge
models.tagline: Sell trip plans, park-wait intel and travel-deal alerts — a travel agent in a box.

models.title: PulseNetwork Affiliate Partner
models.tagline: Zero-build passive income — no box to assemble, just a link: register a code at /api/affiliate/register, append ?ref=CODE to any Pulse endpoint link you share, and earn 25-30% of referred paid calls in USDC — automatically, monthly, on Base.
models.economics_template: {units} referred paid calls × ${retail} avg call × ~27.5% commission, paid monthly in USDC
models._engine_note: Meta-model: this product IS the hub's own affiliate program, not a single fleet vertical. 'signalpulse' is used as the required verticals.ts anchor (validate() only hard-fails on an unknown vertical key — endpoint paths outside that vertical's catalog just warn); the real engine is every priced endpoint fleet-wide.

models.title: PulseNetwork Wholesale Reseller
models.tagline: Build your own AI ___-in-a-Box: get a self-serve wholesale key at /api/wholesale/register ($0.25 free trial), wrap any of PulseNetwork's 733 endpoints in your brand at your own price via x-internal-key, and keep the spread — wholesale is 50% of retail.
models.economics_template: {units} resold calls × ${retail} retail (wholesale ≈50% of retail) × 30d — see also https://github.com/GTCC777/pulse-starter-kit
models._engine_note: Meta-model: same anchor caveat as affiliate-partner — 'signalpulse' is the required verticals.ts key; the real product is reselling ANY of the fleet's 733 endpoints via a scoped wholesale key.
